description: Apache Software Foundation hosts documentation and releases for many open-source projects. Within apache.org, Apache Airflow provides workflow orchestration software, and Qakka is a queue system API documented in an archived OpenAPI spec.
summary: apache.org exposes documented integration surfaces for Apache Airflow: a stable REST API and the airflowctl CLI, plus a cataloged Qakka HTTP API with published OpenAPI but no discoverable auth documentation.
